query:
SELECT 
  DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)) as date,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'test' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%test%' OR phone LIKE '%000%' OR phone LIKE '%123456%' OR name LIKE '%fake%' OR name LIKE '%demo%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as likely_fake,
  source,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT name ORDER BY createdAt DESC SEPARATOR ', ') as sample_names
FROM trialSignups
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) * 1000
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)), source
ORDER BY date DESC, total DESC
LIMIT 30;
